---
name: Documentation issue
about: Report a problem in the public documentation (errors, ambiguities, broken links, inconsistencies).
title: "[docs] "
labels: ["documentation"]
---

## Affected document

<!--
Which document is this about? Please include the file and the section
where applicable, e.g. `BLUEPRINT.md § 3.2` or `NOMENCLATURE.md > Flight Operations > Mission Type`.
-->

## Issue description

<!--
A clear and concise description of the problem.
For example: typo, factual error, ambiguous wording, broken link,
inconsistency with another document, missing information.
-->

## Suggested change (optional)

<!--
If you have a suggestion for how to address the issue, include it here.
A correction, a rewording, or a pointer to a reference is all helpful.
You do not need to provide a full proposal — a clear description of the
problem is already valuable.
-->

## Additional context

<!--
Any other context that would help us understand the issue: links to other
sources, screenshots of rendered documentation, related discussions,
or comparable patterns from other projects.
-->
